subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Hearken unto the melody of God that hath descended from the heaven of His glorious Command, and with its potency rend asunder the veils of idle fancy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محمد بشنو نغمه الله را که از سماء عز امر نازل است و حجبات اوهام را بقوت
subcodes.subjects: @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @transcendence; unknowability of God
